apply: Students will be able to analyze the impact of colonialism on the growth of nationalism in India.
Students will be able to evaluate the contribution of key nationalist leaders like Mahatma Gandhi and Jawaharlal Nehru.
analyze: Students will be able to compare the different forms of nationalism and their effects on Indian society.
Students will be able to assess the role of women in the nationalist movement and their contributions.
remember: Students will be able to recall the key concepts and terminologies related to nationalism.
Students will be able to identify the various forms of nationalism such as economic, cultural, and political.
understand: Students will be able to explain the historical background of nationalism in India.
Students will be able to describe the role of Indian National Congress in the nationalist movement.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT, the objectives for this chapter are: Students will understand the concept of nationalism, its forms, and its significance in Indian history.
board_exam_objectives: CBSE will test the following from this chapter: Nationalism in India, characteristics of nationalism, forms of nationalism (economic, cultural, and political), role of Indian National Congress, impact of colonialism, contributions of key nationalist leaders, role of women in the nationalist movement.
